scope: Scope H — profiles, modes, symlink-backed config switching.
honestReason: A functional profile system (save-current, load-into-pending, apply, diff, rollback-on-failed-apply, symlink-safe target switching, no silent overwrite) is a distinct multi-part subsystem with its own whole-config write/reread/rollback safety surface. It was not built or proven in this pass; shipping a half-built profile apply that can strand the desktop on a failed whole-config swap would violate 'do not weaken safety'. The 'Save Current as Profile' button and 'Save as new profile' menu action stay inert.

whatIsProven.configTargetDetection: ConfigDiscovery resolves the active config; the pending diff writes to and shows that exact path (b-03 shows /home/kyo/.config/hypr/hyprland.conf)
whatIsProven.symlinkAndIncludeGraph: src/config_graph.rs detects symlinks, source/include graph, cycles, and management hints
whatIsProven.noSilentOverwrite: the gated scalar save only ever writes the discovered active config

screenshot: e-profiles-page.png (No Profiles, disabled Save Current as Profile)
remainingWork: symlink/mode target switching with backup + rollback
